name: Liver and Onions
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Beef or pork liver, sliced,
recipeInstructions:
2 servings of about 2-1/2 ounces each (210 calories per serving with beef liver, 200 calories per serving with pork liver)
1. Remove the membrane from the liver, if necessary.
2. Coat the liver slices with flour.
3. Brown the liver on one side in a hot pan over low heat until set.
4. Turn the liver and add salt and pepper. Top with onion slices.
5. Add water and cover the pan tightly.
6. Cook over low heat until the liver is tender, about 25 minutes.
NOTE: If the liver was purchased frozen, partially thaw it in the refrigerator only until the slices can be easily separated. Remove half a pound for this recipe; wrap and return the remaining pieces to the freezer. To maintain quality, do not completely thaw the liver that is to be refrozen. If the liver was purchased fresh, freeze any remaining liver for later use.
